title: 🏷️ MAGAZINE
data_structure:
```
[
    {
        name: 'name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'Top Gear',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'founded',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 1993,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'defunct',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: null,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'focus',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'sports cars',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'publication_frequency',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'monthly',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'single_copy_price',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 5.99,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'single_copy_price_unit',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'GBP',
        validation: ['isValidCurrencyCode'],
    },
    {
        name: 'publication_format',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'print',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'circulation',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 150884,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'circulation_year',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 2013,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'publisher',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'Immediate Media Company',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'issn',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: '1350-9624',
        validation: ['isValidIssn'],
    },
    {
        name: 'country_code',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'GB',
        validation: ['isValidCountryCode'],
    },
]
```
